is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum drug resistance in Uige province, Angola; screened for resistance mutations in P. falciparum isolates.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfcrt 74,75,76,72; Pfmdr1 86; Pfdhfr 51,59,108; Pfdhps 436,437,540,581,613 - many curated codons.

sub_country_location.evidence: All samples collected at Uige Provincial Hospital, Uige province, Angola - a sub-national location.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected between 27 July and 12 August 2004 - single window well within 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: 71 blood samples from children admitted to Pediatric Emergency Unit of Uige Provincial Hospital, Angola in 2004; human field/clinical isolates.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical molecular genotyping study of field samples with microsatellite analysis.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Routine new field collection at a single hospital in 2004; no mention of consortium or shared dataset overlap.

supplement.evidence: All frequency data present in main text and Table 1/Figure 1.

assessment.summary: Primary molecular study of 71 (66 fully characterized) P. falciparum isolates from children at Uige Provincial Hospital, Angola, collected July-August 2004. Reports extractable per-locus frequencies for multiple curated markers (pfcrt 74/75/76, pfmdr1 86, pfdhfr 51/59/108, pfdhps 436/437) at sub-national resolution and single-year temporal window. Meets all criteria.
